_meta.description: US state land pricing reference for TEA land cost estimation
_meta.notes: Prices are per acre. Used to estimate land cost component of CAPEX.

locations.notes: Pasture data not available; farm land used

land_area_by_section.description: Estimated land area required per section (in default 800 ton/yr config)

inputs.notes: Rough guess — assumes most infrastructure included in biomass section footprint

biomass.notes: Computed from pond dimensions × n_ponds with spacing

harvesting.notes: Rough guess — 1 acre per harvest system

drying.notes: Rough guess — 1 acre per drying system
